title: Potion Stacks
body:
![Potion Stacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CQTUbhIo/images/22f24d734b0226d3cd2e79fd2721aafa22c5bea4.webp)

## Description
Potion Stacks is a Minecraft mod that allows potions to stack up to 16, making potion management easier and more convenient.

## Note
This is a slightly modified version of [StackablePotions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stackable-potions-neoforge), to allow it to work together with [Potion Cooldown](https://modrinth.com/mod/potion-cooldown).

## Features
- Potions now stack up to 16
- Potions do not stack in the brewing stand
- Works with modded potions
- No new items or blocks

## Compatibility
- Compatible with most mods that add new potions
- Required on both server and client
